mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_rad_dose WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY measure_month DESC, worker_name ASC, id DESC
SELECT * FROM tb_rad_dose WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_rad_dose WHERE deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_rad_dose (worker_id, worker_name, dept, measure_month, dosimeter_type, effective_dose, hand_dose, lens_dose, measure_org, confirm_no, note, deleted, created_at, modified_at) VALUES ( #{workerId}, #{workerName}, #{dept}, #{measureMonth}, #{dosimeterType}, #{effectiveDose}, #{handDose}, #{lensDose}, #{measureOrg}, #{confirmNo}, #{note}, 0, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_rad_dose SET worker_id = #{workerId}, worker_name = #{workerName}, dept = #{dept}, measure_month = #{measureMonth}, dosimeter_type = #{dosimeterType}, effective_dose = #{effectiveDose}, hand_dose = #{handDose}, lens_dose = #{lensDose}, measure_org = #{measureOrg}, confirm_no = #{confirmNo}, note = #{note}, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_rad_dose SET deleted = 1, modified_at = GETDATE() WHERE id = #{id}
